'''âj-t-d''' ('''kajatad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:macroetch|macroetch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-t-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:macroetch|macroetch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-t-d
|-
! Lemma
| kajatad
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijatad|thijatad]] || [[word:jijatad|jijatad]] || [[word:shijatad|shijatad]] || [[word:kijatad|kijatad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujatad|thuthujatad]] || [[word:jujujatad|jujujatad]] || [[word:shushujatad|shushujatad]] || [[word:kukujatad|kukujatad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujatad|thujatad]] || [[word:jujatad|jujatad]] || [[word:shujatad|shujatad]] || [[word:kujatad|kujatad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujatad|thujatad]] || [[word:jujatad|jujatad]] || [[word:shujatad|shujatad]] || [[word:kujatad|kujatad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejatad|thejatad]] || [[word:jejatad|jejatad]] || [[word:shejatad|shejatad]] || [[word:kejatad|kejatad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojatad|thothojatad]] || [[word:jojojatad|jojojatad]] || [[word:shoshojatad|shoshojatad]] || [[word:kokojatad|kokojatad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojatad|thojatad]] || [[word:jojatad|jojatad]] || [[word:shojatad|shojatad]] || [[word:kojatad|kojatad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojatad|thojatad]] || [[word:jojatad|jojatad]] || [[word:shojatad|shojatad]] || [[word:kojatad|kojatad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjatad|thĂŠjatad]] || [[word:jĂŠjatad|jĂŠjatad]] || [[word:shĂŠjatad|shĂŠjatad]] || [[word:kĂŠjatad|kĂŠjatad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajatad|thathajatad]] || [[word:jajajatad|jajajatad]] || [[word:shashajatad|shashajatad]] || [[word:kakajatad|kakajatad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajatad|thajatad]] || [[word:jajatad|jajatad]] || [[word:shajatad|shajatad]] || [[word:kajatad|kajatad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajatad|thajatad]] || [[word:jajatad|jajatad]] || [[word:shajatad|shajatad]] || [[word:kajatad|kajatad]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajatad|shajatad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajatad|goshajatad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajatad|gokishajatad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajatadnĂŒ|shajatadnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajatadnknĂŒ|goshajatadnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajatadnĂŒ|gokishajatadnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajatadshĂ«|shajatadshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajatadnkshĂ«|goshajatadnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajatadshĂ«|gokishajatadshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajatadro|shajatadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajatadnkro|goshajatadnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajatadro|gokishajatadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajatadmu|shajatadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajatadnkmu|goshajatadnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajatadmu|gokishajatadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajatadsher|shajatadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajatadnksher|goshajatadnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajatadsher|gokishajatadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajatadng|shajatadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajatadnkng|goshajatadnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajatadng|gokishajatadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajatadya|shajatadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajatadnkya|goshajatadnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajatadya|gokishajatadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajatadyam|shajatadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajatadnkyam|goshajatadnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajatadyam|gokishajatadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajatadnĂŒshĂ«|shajatadnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajatadnknĂŒshĂ«|goshajatadnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajatadnĂŒshĂ«|gokishajatadnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajatadnĂŒro|shajatadnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajatadnknĂŒro|goshajatadnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajatadnĂŒro|gokishajatadnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajatadnĂŒmu|shajatadnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajatadnknĂŒmu|goshajatadnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajatadnĂŒmu|gokishajatadnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajatadshĂ«nĂŒ|shajatadshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajatadnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshajatadnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajatadshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishajatadshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajatadshĂ«ro|shajatadshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajatadnkshĂ«ro|goshajatadnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajatadshĂ«ro|gokishajatadshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajatadshĂ«mu|shajatadshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajatadnkshĂ«mu|goshajatadnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajatadshĂ«mu|gokishajatadshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajatadronĂŒ|shajatadronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajatadnkronĂŒ|goshajatadnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajatadronĂŒ|gokishajatadronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajatadroshĂ«|shajatadroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajatadnkroshĂ«|goshajatadnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajatadroshĂ«|gokishajatadroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajatadromu|shajatadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajatadnkromu|goshajatadnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajatadromu|gokishajatadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajatadmunĂŒ|shajatadmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajatadnkmunĂŒ|goshajatadnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajatadmunĂŒ|gokishajatadmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajatadmushĂ«|shajatadmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajatadnkmushĂ«|goshajatadnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajatadmushĂ«|gokishajatadmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajatadmuro|shajatadmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajatadnkmuro|goshajatadnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajatadmuro|gokishajatadmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
